name: Pumpkin-Cream Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Make Graham Cracker Crust: In a medium bowl, lightly toss crumbs with butter to mix well. Press into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate (not the rim). Refrigerate.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
3. Make Pumpkin-Cheese Filling: In a large bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, flour, lemon peel, orange peel, vanilla extract, eggs, egg yolks, and pumpkin. Beat until smooth. Pour over crust.
4. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the center is firm when gently shaken.
5. Meanwhile, make Sour Cream Topping: In a small bowl, combine sour cream, sugar, and vanilla extract; mix well.
6. Spread topping evenly over the pie.
7. Continue baking for 10 minutes longer.
8. Let the pie cool completely on a wire rack (about 1 hour). Refrigerate overnight.
